title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: Verify that a first-time user can complete the onboarding login flow from app launch to the Home Screen via social or username/password sign-in.
steps: Start the app for the first time
Verify the login dialog appears with Cancel and Continue buttons
Tap Continue to reach the login page
Verify the login page shows options to sign in via Microsoft, Apple, or Google, plus username/password fields
Complete login/signup to reach the Home Screen
expected: User successfully reaches the Home Screen after completing the login/signup process.
